use_cases: Full-screen hero section for SaaS and tech company landing pages requiring dramatic visual impact
Landing page hero for hardware engineering, robotics, or advanced technology brands
Eye-catching header for product launch or announcement pages
Portfolio or creative agency hero section seeking memorable visual effects
Hero component for developer tools or open-source project pages
ai_summary: A full-screen hero section featuring an animated ferrofluid effect with metallic, organic spiky shapes created through layered SVG filters. The ferrofluid animation displays multiple floating globules with high-contrast, fractal noise distortion, layered beneath centered typography and content. This component is designed to create a memorable, visually striking entrance for technology and SaaS landing pages.
